results.title: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) has positioned itself as a technology pioneer in the cruise industry with its comprehensive 'Charting the Course' strategy launched in 2024[1]. The company completed a transformative 15-month AWS migration in June 2024, moving over 100 applications and thousands of servers to the cloud, positioning itself to leverage AI, machine learning, and generative AI services[2]. NCLH is now implementing AI across multiple business functions, from its GenAI assistant 'Nora' for cruise booking support to real-time personalized messaging platforms for onboard guests[3]. The company's AI initiatives are underpinned by hiring signals showing 7.3% of job postings mentioning AI skills, with tech roles at 14.3% and non-tech roles at 5.3%[4].
...

Moved over 100 applications, thousands of virtual and physical servers to AWS. Company plans to leverage AWS analytics, machine learning, and generative AI services for rapid prototyping of new features and services. Migration resulted in significant performance improvements and handled record volumes without issues during peak traffic events.
...
### Nora - GenAI Cruise Booking Assistant
...
GenAI-driven itinerary search assistant powered by OpenAI's ChatGPT and AWS to help guests plan cruise vacations
...
Developed in partnership with Slalom, Nora helps guests navigate the complex cruise booking process with personalized recommendations. Guests are 58% more likely to enter the booking funnel at 16% higher value. Built with guardrails for data protection and toxicity prevention.
...
### AI Lead Generation and Marketing Optimization
...
AI and machine learning for doubling leads while maintaining marketing spending levels
...
AI technology generating leads without increasing marketing expenses, with spending on par with 2019 levels. Contributing to record monthly bookings from January through July 2023. Company developing streamlined booking process using generative AI for personalized guest experiences.
...
Nora is a GenAI-driven itinerary search assistant powered by OpenAI's ChatGPT and AWS. It helps guests navigate cruise booking by providing personalized vacation recommendations based on their preferences, improving booking conversion by 58% at 16% higher value.
...
NCLH completed a 15-month migration moving over 100 applications and thousands of servers to AWS cloud infrastructure. This migration positioned the company to leverage AI, machine learning, and generative AI services for future innovation and operational improvements.
...
NCLH shows 7.3% of job postings mention AI skills, with tech roles at 14.3% and non-tech roles at 5.3%. This indicates growing AI adoption across departments including Product, Engineering, Customer Service, and Legal functions.

results.title: Manaswini G
highlights:
Active looking for Full-time opportunities as a Machine Learning || Data Scientist || Data Analyst
...
Data Scientist at [Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd.](https://www.linkedin.com/company/norwegian-cruise-line)
...
Data Science professional with 5+ years of experience building machine learning models, scalable data pipelines, and advanced analytics solutions across travel, finance, insurance, and fleet management domains. Experienced in developing forecasting, recommendation, and predictive models using Python, SQL, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, TensorFlow, and PyTorch. Strong expertise in statistical modeling, A/B testing, hypothesis testing, and time-series analysis to drive data-driven decision-making and business impact. Skilled in large-scale data processing using Snowflake, Spark, Hadoop, and cloud platforms including AWS and Azure. Hands-on experience in NLP, ETL pipeline development, MLOps, and production model monitoring using Docker, Kubernetes, Git, and CI/CD workflows. Proficient in building dashboards and communicating complex insights to technical and non-technical stakeholders using Tableau, Power BI, and Streamlit.
...
### Data Scientist at [Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd.](https://www.linkedin.com/company/norwegian-cruise-line) (Current)
...
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to build machine learning models and scalable data pipelines for booking demand forecasting, identifying how key drivers such as pricing, capacity, seasonality, campaign spend, and time-series trends influence booking behavior. Partnered in developing a Next Best Destination (NBD) model to predict guests’ top 3 destinations based on travel behavior, improving targeting and driving higher booking conversions. Contributed to migrating legacy Einstein models from Salesforce to Snowflake, enhancing scalability and performance. Conducted time-series analysis, backtesting, and validation on historical data to derive feature importance and actionable business insights. Applied A/B testing, causal analysis, and lift metrics to evaluate model performance, measure campaign effectiveness, and validate business impact. Built and optimized large-scale datasets in Snowflake to support model training and inference. Developed a Streamlit dashboard for production model health monitoring, enabling real-time tracking and early detection of model failures. Used Git for version control, model management, and reproducibility of ML experiments.
...
Norwegian Cruise
...
Collaborated with the data science team to build machine learning models and scalable data pipelines for financial forecasting, portfolio analysis, and investment strategy optimization using algorithms such as XGBoost, Random Forest, LightGBM, and Logistic Regression. Worked on data preprocessing, feature engineering, and large-scale financial data analysis using Python, SQL, and AWS Redshift. Conducted time-series forecasting and model validation to analyze market trends and portfolio risk, and applied NLP techniques for sentiment analysis on financial news and analyst reports. Developed ETL pipelines using Spark and Airflow, built dashboards and visualizations for stakeholder reporting, and supported MLOps workflows using AWS SageMaker, Docker, Kubernetes, Git, and Azure DevOps for scalable model deployment and monitoring.

results.title: Senior Analyst, Onboard Revenue | Remotepulse
highlights:
# Senior Analyst, Onboard Revenue
...
This position is classified as “in-office.” As an in-office role, it requires employees to work from a designated Carnival office in South Florida Tuesday through Thursday each week. Employees may work from their homes on Mondays and Fridays. Candidates must be located in (or willing to relocate to) the Miami/Ft. Lauderdale area. The Onboard Revenue Senior Analyst is responsible for leveraging data analytics and advanced modeling techniques to drive revenue optimization and enhance the guest experience across onboard operations. It involves analyzing complex datasets, developing predictive models, and maintaining robust data infrastructure to support strategic decision-making. The Onboard Revenue Data Scientist will work closely with revenue management, onboard operations, marketing, finance, and IT teams to uncover insights, streamline processes, and implement data-driven solutions that align with business goals. The ideal candidate will have strong analytical skills, experience with machine learning and data visualization, and a collaborative mindset to thrive in a cross-functional environment.

results.title: Matthew Salas
highlights:
Senior Data Engineer | 10+ Years | Bridging Data Engineering & Agentic AI | Semper Fidelis
...
Data Engineer at [Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd.](https://www.linkedin.com/company/norwegian-cruise-line)
...
I'm a data engineer with over 10 years of experience architecting scalable data platforms and leading analytics transformations. I've built my career on a foundation of modern data warehousing (Snowflake, BigQuery, dbt), cloud infrastructure, and translating complex business requirements into reliable, high-performance data products. What sets me apart today is how I'm approaching the next wave of data engineering. I'm not waiting for AI to reshape the field—I'm actively working at the intersection of traditional data engineering and agentic AI. Currently: · Leading data platform initiatives at Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings, building ELT pipelines on Snowflake with Matillion and dbt · Championing AI-assisted development across my team using GitHub Copilot Pro, Snowflake Cortex, and Matillion Maia · Exploring agentic AI frameworks (OpenClaw) on personal projects to understand how autonomous agents can interact with data infrastructure I believe the future of data engineering isn't about replacing core skills with AI—it's about engineering data systems that are AI-ready: metadata-rich, agent-friendly, and built for semantic understanding. I'm always open to connecting with others working at the intersection of data engineering, AI infrastructure, and modern analytics.

...
# Norwegian Cruise Line Data Scientist Salary
...
The average Norwegian Cruise Line Data Scientist earns an estimated $142,614 annually, which includes an estimated base salary of $121,277 with a $21,337 bonus. Norwegian Cruise Line's Data Scientist compensation is $13,109 more than the US average for a Data Scientist. Data Scientist salaries at Norwegian Cruise Line can range from $47,500 - $280,000.

Data Scientists earn $1,380 more than Lead Engineers, and $8,871 less than Sales Engineers.

results.title: Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote) | Wfh
highlights:
# Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity) (Remote)
...
Senior Data Scientist, Platform (Integrity)
...
Department: Data Science
...
Trust is the foundation of a vibrant Airbnb community. The Content Integrity Data Science team helps build and protect that trust by ensuring that the content on Airbnb, including listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated experiences, is accurate, authentic and aligned with our policies and community standards.
...
We partner closely with product, engineering, policy and operations teams to develop advanced AI-driven content understanding systems, scale effective human-in-the-loop workflows and proactively defend against emerging content risks, so guests and hosts can interact with confidence.
...
This role is unique in that it directly improves the safety, trust, and quality of real-world user experiences by advancing Airbnb’s ability to understand, interpret and act on content at scale. You will help shape how the platform reasons about listings, profiles, messages and other user-generated content by building the next generation of Trust Content Understanding Models.
...
- The ideal candidate is a motivated and talented “full-stack” Data Scientist with strong applied ML intuition and a bias toward impact, who can own and drive forward challenging, high-visibility initiatives such as:
...
- Advance Airbnb’s content integrity capabilities by building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and LLM-based models that understand intent, policy compliance, quality and risk across listings, profiles, and user communications
...
- Develop high-performing models for detecting problematic or misleading content, including text classification, semantic similarity, information extraction and generative model-based reasoning for policy interpretation and enforcement
...
- Design and optimize human-in-the-loop Machine Learning (ML) systems for content review, labeling, escalation and continuous model improvement
...
- Build systems to detect emerging content risks and abuse patterns across regions, cohorts and surfaces using statistical, ML and representation-learning approaches
...
- Design intelligent sampling and evaluation strategies to measure rare events, policy recall, false positives/negatives and model blind spots in large-scale content systems
...
- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning: Build and deploy production AI/ML systems for content integrity and trust content understanding, including feature engineering, model development and evaluation, thresholding, error analysis and end-to-end model lifecycle management. This includes working with NLP and LLM-based models in real production settings.
...
- Inference: Partner with inference data scientists to conduct rigorous quantitative analyses, applying working knowledge of causal inference to interpret results, assess impact, and identify gaps and opportunities to improve content quality and trust outcomes.
...
- 5+ years of industry experience in a quantitative analysis role with a Master’s degree in a quantitative field (computer science, statistics etc.), or 2+ years of experience with a Ph.D.
...
- State-of-the-art knowledge of AI/ML models
- Hands-on experience building, evaluating, and deploying NLP and LLM-based solutions, including text classification, information extraction, semantic understanding or generative applications.
...
This position is US - Remote Eligible. The role may include occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager. While the position is Remote Eligible, you must live in a state where Airbnb, Inc. has a registered entity. Click here for the up-to-date list of excluded states. This list is continuously evolving, so please check back with us if the state you live in is on the exclusion list. If your position is employed by another Airbnb entity, your recruiter will inform you what states you are eligible to work from.
